description_long: This object is a stylized, modern military jet airplane with a sleek, angular design and a predominantly green exterior. The wings are sharply swept back, forming a delta shape that merges smoothly with the fuselage, and there are twin vertical stabilizers at the rear. The cockpit is enclosed with a blue-tinted canopy, positioned forward on the fuselage, and appears to be a single-seat configuration. The nose is pointed and colored brown, suggesting a radar or sensor housing. The underside and engine area are not highly detailed, but a single rear exhaust is visible, indicating a jet propulsion system. No landing gear is visible, and the surface finish appears smooth and hard, typical of metal-skinned aircraft.
description: A green, delta-wing jet airplane with a blue-tinted forward cockpit, twin vertical stabilizers, and a pointed brown nose. The design is sleek and angular, with a single rear jet exhaust.
description_view_0: Top-down view showing the full delta wing shape, twin vertical stabilizers, and the blue cockpit canopy.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the sharp nose, forward cockpit, and the angular sweep of the wings.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the twin vertical stabilizers, single jet exhaust, and the broad delta wing.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, emphasizing the wing sweep and cockpit placement.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Low-wing, sharply swept delta wing with no visible winglets or dihedral/anhedral angles.
attribute_engine_type: Single rear-mounted jet engine with visible exhaust.
attribute_tail_design: Twin vertical stabilizer tail configuration, no horizontal stabilizers visible.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed single-seat cockpit with a blue-tinted canopy.
